.github/workflows/acceptance-test.tests..general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 21 instead of JDK 17 for acceptance tests.
.github/workflows/acceptance-test.tests..before:
name: Set up JDK 17
java-version: openjdk17
.github/workflows/acceptance-test.tests..after:
name: Set up JDK 21
java-version: openjdk21

.github/workflows/api.tests.actions.yml.general_idea: Update the CI workflow to use JDK 21 instead of JDK 17 for the API tests.
.github/workflows/api.tests.actions.yml.before:
name: Set up JDK 17
java-version: openjdk17
.github/workflows/api.tests.actions.yml.after:
name: Set up JDK 21
java-version: openjdk21

.github/workflows/frontend.tests.actions.general_idea: Add Node.js 18 setup step to the frontend test workflow to ensure the correct runtime environment is available.

.github/workflows/library.publish.action.general_idea: Update the Node.js version in the CI workflow from 14.x to 18.x to align with the project's migration to Node 18.

.github/workflows/quarkus-ecosystem.acti.general_idea: Update the CI environment variable to use Java 21 instead of Java 11 to align with the target JDK version.

Makefile.general_idea: Refactor the monolithic 'dev' target into specialized targets for frontend, library, and combined development workflows.
Makefile.after:
dev-frontend:
	cd frontend && yarn && yarn start

watch-lib:
	cd library && yarn run watch;

dev-lib:
	make build-lib
	make -j2 watch-lib dev-frontend

dev-lib-staging:
	REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://stage.code.quarkus.io make dev-lib

acceptance-test/pom.xml.general_idea: Bump Playwright dependency version from 1.26.0 to 1.29.0.

api/pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures test library compatibility with newer Java versions and fixes potential bugs.

api/pom.xml.general_idea: Add Quarkus JUnit5 Mockito dependency for testing.
api/pom.xml.why_exists: Enables Mockito integration with Quarkus JUnit5 tests, likely required for new or refactored tests.

api/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Quarkus devtools version in the 'local' profile to a specific stable version instead of SNAPSHOT.
api/pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures consistent devtools version during local development when not using the latest snapshot.

api/src/test/resources//snapshots//Quark.general_idea: Ensure the file ends with a newline character to comply with POSIX standards and linter rules.
api/src/test/resources//snapshots//Quark.before:
}
\ No newline at end of file

api/src/test/resources//snapshots//Quark.general_idea: Ensure the file ends with a newline character to comply with POSIX standards and linter rules.
api/src/test/resources//snapshots//Quark.before:
}
